public class LoginRequest{
String userEmail;
String userPassword;

public string getuserEmail(){
return userEmail;
}

public void setUserEmail(String userEmail){
this.userEmail=userEmai;
}

public string getuserpassord(){
return userpassword;
}

public void setuserpassword(String userEmail){
this.userpassword=userpassord;
}


RequestSpecification req = new RequestSpecBuilder()
.setBaseUri("url")
.setContentType(contentType.JSON).build();

LoginRequest login = new LoginRequest();
login.setUserEmail("koti@gmai");
login.setPassword("djhhf");

RequestSpecification reqLogin = given().log().all().spec(req).body(login);

LoginResopnse response = reqLogin.when().post("api/json")
.then().log().all().extract().response();

response.getToken
